dataList.content: <color=#ebcaa2>All allies fully heal HP and SP</color>
For this Encounter, <color=#ebcaa2>all allies</color> gain {0}
Gain {0} E.G.O resource for all Affinities

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Past" Passive:
"When hit by a Sinner, Butterfly of Entangled Lives inflicts Burn and Burn Count on the said Sinner"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Past" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Past'-exclusive Skill 'Kalpāgni' gains Final Power and its final Coin inflicts SP damage On Hit"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Past" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives inflicts HP Healing Down and Wrath Fragility on Sinners who have enough Burn"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Present" Passive:
"When Butterfly of Entangled Lives hits Critically, it does not lose Poise Count; gains a large amount of Poise Potency and Count at Turn Start"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Present" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Present'-exclusive Skill 'Smite the Wicked' gains Final Power and its final Coin raises Stagger Threshold On Hit"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Present" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives deals more damage on Critical Hit based on its Poise Potency and Count"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Future" Passive:
"Turn Start: Sinners gain Bleed Count"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Future" Passive: 
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Future'-exclusive Skill 'Bloodflower' gains Final Power; On Hit, its final Coin heals HP on self"

In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Future" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives heals HP every time Bleed is activated on it or the Sinners"
[All enemies and allies gain the following positive effects for this Section]
- Gain +50% max HP (max 200; excluding Peccatula Invidiae)
- Remove the first Stagger Threshold
[All enemies and allies gain the following positive effects for this Section]
- Turn Start: Gain 1 Offense Level Up for every allied unit (including self) in the same faction as self (max 4)
[All enemies and allies gain the following positive effects for this Section]
- Gain +50% max HP (max 200; excluding Peccatula Invidiae)
- When hit by Unbreakable Coins, take -20% damage
[All enemies and allies gain the following positive effects for this Section]
- Gain 1 Stack of a random status, chosen from Slash DMG Up, Pierce DMG Up, and Blunt DMG Up. When using an E.G.O Skill of the corresponding Attack Type, deal +50% damage
- On Hit with Unbreakable Coins, deal +20% damage
[All allies gain the following positive effects for this Section]
- Gain +50% max HP (max 200; excluding Peccatula Invidiae)
- Remove the first Stagger Threshold
- Turn End: 4 allies that have the lowest SP heal 4 SP (once per turn; excluding units under effects that prevent SP recovery)
[All allies gain the following positive effects for this Section]
- Turn Start: Gain 1 Offense Level Up for every ally defeated in this Encounter (max 6)
- Combat Start: On A-Reson., Skills that are a part of the A-Reson. chain deal +20% damage
